## Summary

Describe the research-engine, benchmark, or infrastructure change in a few sentences.

## Testing

- [ ] Tested locally or explain why not applicable
- [ ] Added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] If this changes benchmark behavior, describe the expected impact

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name uses an approved prefix such as `feature/*`, `fix/*`, `chore/*`, or `docs/*`
- [ ] No direct commits to `main`
- [ ] Linked the relevant issue, benchmark, or context in the PR body
- [ ] Updated docs, CI, or benchmark notes if needed
